columns.extraction_plan: The OS rate at 5 years for the orteronel group is reported as 59.7% in the 'Primary End Point' section on page 4. Figure 1 on page 3 also shows a 5-year estimate of 59% for the LHRHa plus orteronel arm.

The OS rate at 5 years for the control group is reported as 57.9% in the 'Primary End Point' section on page 4. Figure 1 on page 3 also shows a 5-year estimate of 58% for the LHRHa plus bicalutamide arm.

I looked for 'synchronous' disease classification in Table 1 (page 5) under 'Disease severity' and 'Preregistration LHRH suppression', and in Appendix Table A3 (page 13) which details treatment outcomes by disease severity (Extensive/Minimal), but the document does not categorize patients by synchronous vs. metachronous disease onset for OS rates.

I looked for 'synchronous' disease classification in Table 1 (page 5) under 'Disease severity' and 'Preregistration LHRH suppression', and in Appendix Table A3 (page 13) which details treatment outcomes by disease severity (Extensive/Minimal), but the document does not categorize patients by synchronous vs. metachronous disease onset for OS rates.

I looked for 'metachronous' disease classification in Table 1 (page 5) under 'Disease severity' and 'Preregistration LHRH suppression', and in Appendix Table A3 (page 13) which details treatment outcomes by disease severity (Extensive/Minimal), but the document does not categorize patients by synchronous vs. metachronous disease onset for OS rates.

I looked for 'metachronous' disease classification in Table 1 (page 5) under 'Disease severity' and 'Preregistration LHRH suppression', and in Appendix Table A3 (page 13) which details treatment outcomes by disease severity (Extensive/Minimal), but the document does not categorize patients by synchronous vs. metachronous disease onset for OS rates.
Appendix Table A3 (page 13) under 'Extensive' disease group (defined as high volume in footnote b of Table A2 on page 12) shows 'OS Orteronel Median/5 Year' as 4.8 years/47%. The OS rate is 47%.
Appendix Table A3 (page 13) under 'Extensive' disease group (defined as high volume in footnote b of Table A2 on page 12) shows 'OS Control Median/5 Year' as 4.1 years/44%. The OS rate is 44%.
Appendix Table A3 (page 13) under 'Minimal' disease group (equivalent to low volume) shows 'OS Orteronel Median/5 Year' as NR/71%. The OS rate is 71%.
Appendix Table A3 (page 13) under 'Minimal' disease group (equivalent to low volume) shows 'OS Control Median/5 Year' as NR/71%. The OS rate is 71%.
